Portfolio Work

5 Projects — Job-Winning Strategy

Cross-domain projects targeting 5 roles — real datasets, industry tools, and clear business problem statements. Project 1 is live; 2–5 in progress.

Banking & Finance · FP&A ✓ Live
PROJECT 01
HDFC Bank Financial Performance Dashboard
"How healthy is HDFC Bank's financial position — and what is driving profitability in FY2025 vs FY2024?"
Full-cycle FP&A project on HDFC Bank's consolidated financials. Extracted P&L and Balance Sheet from the FY2025 Annual Report, cleaned and structured in Excel using Power Query, built a relational data model with Fact + Year tables, authored 7 DAX measures, and delivered an interactive Power BI dashboard with KPI cards, trend line, P&L matrix, balance sheet comparison, and asset structure treemap. All figures independently verified against source Excel data.
End-to-End Workflow
HDFC Annual Report→ Excel + Power Query→ Fact + Year Tables→ DAX Measures→ Power BI Dashboard
Power BI Dashboard — Actual Screenshot
✕
🔍 Click to zoom
Click the image to view full size · Built in Power BI Desktop · FY2024–2025 Consolidated
DAX Measures Built
Total Income Net Profit Cost-to-Income Ratio Profit Margin Loan-to-Deposit Ratio Revenue Growth YoY Total Assets
Key Findings
Income grew 15.4% YoY (₹4.08L Cr → ₹4.71L Cr) while expenses rose 16.1% — cost pressure slightly outpaced revenue growth
Advances dominate assets at 62% (₹27.2L Cr) — Loan-to-Deposit of 100.52% signals aggressive lending relative to deposit base
Cost-to-Income at 84.40% is elevated — every ₹100 of income costs ₹84 to generate, limiting operational leverage
Dashboard fix identified: Income Trend X-axis was reversed (2025→2024), making growing income appear as a decline — flagged and corrected in documentation
Power BI DesktopExcelPower QueryDAXData ModellingFinancial Statement AnalysisHDFC Annual Report FY2025

PROJECT 02
Fintech Lending Decision Engine — Risk vs Return Optimisation
"How should a fintech lender decide whom to approve — maximising profit while controlling default risk and fraud exposure?"
Built a lending decision engine on a 300-customer synthetic dataset with 19 engineered features. Designed risk segmentation logic, computed Risk-Adjusted Returns, flagged fraud, and delivered a Tableau dashboard with an interactive Risk vs Return scatter, profit-by-risk breakdown, approval distribution, and fraud analysis — with slicers for Credit Score, Income, Risk Category, and Loan Amount.
End-to-End Workflow
300-Customer Dataset→ Feature Engineering→ Risk Segmentation→ Decision Logic→ Tableau Dashboard
Tableau Dashboard — Actual Screenshot
✕
Click to zoom · Built in Tableau · 300 customers · 19 engineered features

19 Features Engineered in Dataset
Income Customer Segment Avg Transaction Value Monthly Transactions Credit Score Loan Amount Interest Rate Transaction Volume Behavioral Score Default Probability Interest Income Expected Loss Net Profit Loan Risk Flag Risk Adjusted Return Risk Category Loan Decision Fraud Flag
Key Findings
Low Risk customers have 100% approval rate — zero rejections, confirming the decision engine correctly identifies safe borrowers
Medium Risk drives 62% of total profit (₹82.96L of ₹1.33Cr) — the sweet spot for risk-return optimisation
High Risk approval rate is only 26.7% — engine correctly rejects 73.3% of high-risk applicants to control portfolio default exposure
28.67% fraud rate (86 customers) — Fraud Flag acts as a soft filter layered on top of risk-based approval logic
Tableau Excel 300-Customer Dataset Feature Engineering Risk Segmentation Fraud Detection Logic Decision Engine Design

Portfolio · Finance Analytics ✓ Live
PROJECT 03
Mutual Fund Portfolio — Risk & Return Analysis
"Which mutual fund combination delivers the best risk-adjusted return — and what does the optimal portfolio look like?"
3-year NAV analysis (Mar 2023 – Mar 2026) across 4 mutual funds — ICICI Pru, Invesco Small Cap, PPFAS, and SBI Focused Equity. Consolidated daily NAV data into a MasterSheet, computed daily returns, built a Correlation Matrix, constructed 10 portfolio combinations (P1–P10), and identified the optimal portfolio using Sharpe Ratio maximisation. Risk-free rate: 6.77% (RBI repo rate).
End-to-End Workflow
MF NAV Data (4 Funds)→ MasterSheet (Daily Returns)→ Pivot Table→ Correlation Matrix→ Efficient Frontier (P1–P10)
Individual Fund Performance — From Excel (Mar 2023 – Mar 2026)
Fund Start NAV End NAV CAGR Ann. Volatility Ann. Return Sharpe Ratio
ICICI Pru 11.21 18.52 18.22% 12.93% 17.99% 0.87
Invesco Small Cap 22.19 42.36 24.05% 16.80% 23.51% 1.00
PPFAS ⭐ Best Risk-Adj. 52.61 87.79 18.61% 9.50% 17.94% 1.18
SBI Focused Equity 238.52 394.66 18.28% 10.87% 17.79% 1.01
Source: Correlation Matrix sheet · All metrics computed from 739 daily NAV data points per fund

PROJECT 04
Business Performance & Market Expansion Analysis
"Which cities drive profitability — and where should the business expand next?"
End-to-end business analytics solution evaluating company performance and identifying market expansion opportunities. Integrates financial, operational, and customer-level data to generate city-level insights using Tableau and Alteryx. Features a strategy matrix mapping demand vs profitability to flag expansion-ready markets.
End-to-End Workflow
Raw Data (Multi-source)→ Alteryx (Transform + Join)→ City-Level Analysis→ Tableau Dashboard
Tableau Dashboard — Actual Screenshot
✕
Click to zoom · Built in Tableau + Alteryx · City-level performance · 2017–2018

Total Revenue

Profit Margin
Top Cities by Profitability

Market Expansion Strategy Matrix — Key Insight
🏆 STAR MARKET
Sao Paulo
High demand + High profit · Dominant market
📈 GROWTH MARKET
Rio de Janeiro
High demand + High profit · Expansion ready
⚠️ EMERGING
Brasilia
Low demand + Low profit · Monitor closely
Key Highlights
86.23% profit margin — extremely high, indicating strong unit economics across the business
Sao Paulo dominates — 15,402 orders and ₹1.90M profit; accounts for ~44% of total orders
Revenue peaked in 2018 (~₹400K/month) then dropped sharply — last month flagged as incomplete data
Alteryx used for data transformation — joins across multiple datasets, cleaning, and aggregation before Tableau visualisation
Tableau Alteryx Excel City-Level Analysis Market Expansion Matrix Unit Economics Revenue Trend Analysis

Business Process Automation using Alteryx
